title: Red Eyes Black Dragon [cobblemon]
description: adds Red Eyes Black Dragon and Red Eyes Darkness Dragon to cobblemon
body:
# 🐉 Red-Eyes Dragon Addon for Cobblemon

This addon introduces two iconic dragons into Cobblemon: **Red-Eyes Black Dragon** and **Red-Eyes Darkness Dragon**.  
Both come with their own stats, spawn details, abilities, and custom moves to bring their fiery presence to your world.

---

## 📥 Installation

<details> <summary>Singleplayer</summary>

- Place the datapack `.zip` file into your `/datapacks` folder of your world.  
- Place the same `.zip` file into your `/resourcepacks` folder.  
- Enable the resource pack from the in-game menu.

</details>

<details> <summary>Multiplayer / Server</summary>

Servers:

Put the .zip in /world/datapacks
(Sometimes it's called myworld, or something similar — it may also have a custom name)
If you're in doubt about the correct folder, consult your server provider's guide on how to add datapacks
Every Player has to have the .zip installed as a Resource Pack

Best option is for them to have it installed and enabled in their client
It's possible to add it to server resources, but note there have been issues with this for some Cobblemon addons — so try whatever method suits you best

</details>

---

## 🐲 Red-Eyes Black Dragon

Typing: **Fire/Dragon**  
Spawn: **Nether**, minimum level 70, weight 5.

<details> <summary>✨ Abilities (No Custom Version)</summary>

These are the abilities for the **no custom moves version**:

- **Levitate** – Immune to Ground-type moves.  
- **Flash Fire** – Powers up Fire-type moves if hit by one.  
- **Berserk (Hidden Ability)** – Raises Special Attack when HP drops below half.

</details>

<details> <summary>⚔️ Custom Moves & Abilities</summary>

**Abilities:**

- **Levitate** – Immune to Ground-type moves.  
- **Raging Inferno** – Boosts Attack and Special Attack at HP thresholds (80%, 60%, 40%). Fire-type moves deal 1.3× damage.  
- **Eternal Ember (Hidden Ability)** – Opposing Fire-types faint at the end of each turn. Fire-type moves always inflict burn. User survives at 1 HP if an opponent is burned.

**Custom Moves:**

- **Burn Away** – Fire-type move that destroys the opponent’s held item and inflicts burn.  
- **Blazing Cataclysm** – Fire-type move that hits all foes with high base power and has a chance to burn.  
- **Ashen Wing** – Flying-type move; deals more damage if the target is burned.  
- **Black Comet** – Dragon-type multi-hit move (2–5 times), each strike has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense.

</details>

<details> <summary>📊 Base Stats</summary>

```
HP: 105
Attack: 150
Defense: 90
Special Attack: 150
Special Defense: 90
Speed: 95
Total: 680
```

</details>

---

## 🐉 Red-Eyes Darkness Dragon

Typing: **Dark/Dragon**  
Spawn: **Nether**, minimum level 70, weight 2.

<details> <summary>✨ Abilities (No Custom Version)</summary>

These are the abilities for the **no custom moves version**:

- **Levitate** – Immune to Ground-type moves.  
- **Intimidate** – Lowers opposing Pokémon’s Attack upon entry.  
- **Beast Boost (Hidden Ability)** – Boosts highest stat after knocking out a foe.

</details>

<details> <summary>⚔️ Custom Moves & Abilities</summary>

**Abilities:**

- **Levitate** – Immune to Ground-type moves.  
- **Black Flame Dominion** – On entry, lowers enemy accuracy by 50% and boosts Fire/Dark moves by 1.5×. After 3 turns, burns all opponents.  
- **Eternal Ember (Hidden Ability)** – Opposing Fire-types faint at the end of each turn. Fire-type moves always inflict burn. User survives at 1 HP if an opponent is burned.

**Custom Moves:**

- **Abyssal Dragon Roar** – Dragon-type move with a chance to confuse all foes.  
- **Ashen Wing** – Flying-type move; deals more damage if the target is burned.  
- **Black Comet** – Dragon-type multi-hit move (2–5 times), each strike has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense.  
- **Blazing Cataclysm** – Fire-type move that hits all foes with high base power and has a chance to burn.  
- **Burn Away** – Fire-type move that destroys the opponent’s held item and inflicts burn.  
- **Crimson Shadow Fang** – Dark-type move with high crit ratio; heals the user for half the damage dealt.  
- **Necroflame Burst** – Fire/Dark hybrid move that deals double damage if the target is statused.

</details>

<details> <summary>📊 Base Stats</summary>

```
HP: 120
Attack: 170
Defense: 120
Special Attack: 170
Special Defense: 120
Speed: 80
Total: 780
```

</details>

---
